name: tts-cpp
description: Text-to-speech inference in pure C++/ggml. Ships Resemble Chatterbox (Turbo + Multilingual variants) and Supertonic engines under a unified Engine API. Sourced from tetherto/qvac-ext-lib-whisper.cpp's tts-cpp/ subfolder. This pin (master HEAD ce9ee96f, PR #69) adds QVAC-21483 output-frequency selection: EngineOptions::output_sample_rate on both engines (seam-free streaming via a single utterance-spanning OutputResampler, batch-identical), the public tts_cpp resampler, and CLI flags. Layered on 28f37eae (PR #72, QVAC-21335 MeCab support for Chatterbox MTL Japanese), 4c8767a2 (PR #68, QVAC-16579 LavaSR enhancer), 586268bf (PR #67, QVAC-20557 ARM Mali Vulkan Chatterbox), 46921668 (PR #65, QVAC-19557 S3TokenizerV2 host-mirror elimination), 1cc2d383 (QVAC-21118 chunk-streaming CFM-step floor), a679c7e7 (QVAC-19557 streamed GGUF loads + selectable KV-cache dtype), and the b95ad447 base (QVAC-20616 EOS robustness PR #53 + QVAC-20557 Supertonic Android GPU PR #54). Consumes the ggml-speech and mecab ports.
